stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 17, the primary objective of States as regards safeguarding civil aviation against acts of unlawful interference is the:

options.a: Safety of aerodrome facilities, including landside and airside buildings.
options.b: Safety of passengers, crew, ground personnel, and the general public.
options.c: Safe application of immigration and customs procedures.
options.d: Safety of aircraft engaged in international civil operations.
